allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('L1 Smartpms members:', j.group_memberships?.length\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j.group_memberships?.slice\(0,3\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('L1 Smartpricing members:', j.group_memberships?.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const t=j.results||[]; console.log\('total:', j.count\); console.log\('sample assignee_ids:', [...new Set\(t.map\(x=>x.assignee_id\)\)].join\(', '\)\); console.log\('sample satisfaction:', t.slice\(0,3\).map\(x=>JSON.stringify\(x.satisfaction_rating\)\)\); console.log\('reply_counts:', t.slice\(0,3\).map\(x=>x.reply_count\)\)")
